title: Gidget Goes to Rome
writer: Ruth Brooks Flippen, Katherine Albert, Dale Eunson
actors: James Darren, Cindy Carol, Jessie Royce Landis
plot: Gidget, in Rome for a holiday, misinterprets attention she receives from a famous journalist. Discovering he is "chaperoning" her at Dad's request she resumes interest in her boyfriend. Based upon characters created by Frederick K...
